series_metadata.series_description: ﻿Table updates and creations to the CRIS-E system that are driven by policy or programming changes in administering the public assistance programs. Tables screen printouts are retained for reference to document and provide a history of questions, issues and responses relating to the programs.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: system printouts in office no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: ﻿ in office superseded, obsolete or replaced
